subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Great Name! Though occupations descend like winter rains, yet still the joy of the friends is attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده اسم اعظم هر چند مشغله مانند باران بهمن است با وجود این سرور یاران منظور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude
